allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Srees\\project\\knowledge-docs" && \(Get-Content "docs/ai-security-governance/policy/Vol1b_Authorization_Deep_Dive.md"\) -replace '^# Enterprise Authorization Deep Dive: Engines, Interceptor Patterns & XACML$', '# Enterprise Authorization Deep Dive: Engines, Interceptor Patterns & XACML \(Vol 1b\)' | Set-Content "docs/ai-security-governance/policy/Vol1b_Authorization_Deep_Dive.md" -Encoding UTF8)

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\Srees\\project\\knowledge-docs\\build\\graph-related.json"; if \(Test-Path $f\) { $size = \(Get-Item $f\).Length; Write-Output "build/graph-related.json exists — $\([math]::Round\($size/1024\)\)KB" } else { Write-Output "NOT FOUND" }; $f2 = "C:\\Users\\Srees\\project\\knowledge-docs\\static\\graph-related.json"; if \(Test-Path $f2\) { Write-Output "static/graph-related.json also present" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "HKCU:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Lxss" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $props = Get-ItemProperty $_.PSPath; [PSCustomObject]@{ Name=$props.DistributionName; BasePath=$props.BasePath; State=$props.State } } 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Lxss" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Lxss" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Get-ItemProperty $_.PSPath } | Select-Object DistributionName, BasePath, State)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Lxss" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Key: $\($_.PSChildName\)"; Get-ItemProperty $_.PSPath | Format-List })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "HKCU:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Lxss" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-ItemProperty $_.PSPath; [PSCustomObject]@{ Name=$p.DistributionName; BasePath=$p.BasePath } })

PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName "Microsoft-Windows-Hyper-V-ComputeNetwork/Operational" -MaxEvents 20 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Message -match "WSL|file|found" } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List)

PowerShell([System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "User"\) | ForEach-Object { if \($_\) { "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set \(length: $\($_.Length\)\)" } else { "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is NOT set" } })
